data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the acceptance workflow requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the acceptance workflow where a substitute can accept or decline an offer. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for an acceptance workflow, but there is no direct evidence supporting its implementation or availability, indicating a gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of an acceptance workflow where substitutes can accept or decline offers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the acceptance workflow functionality.
